Home  About us  Careers

Careers
Helping make a REAL difference – every day

A lot has changed over 40 years of helping customers across Canada, but at the heart of what M&M Food Market does, is our people. Whether shaping the direction of the business from head office or offering customers exceptional service every day in our stores, we are successful because of our amazing team.

If you’re a food enthusiast who values quality and innovation, a fan of feeling a connection to your community and country, and a team player looking to develop their skills and career, we’d like to hear from you. Browse our open positions and consider joining our team!

Be part of a dynamic and growing food retail team.
